generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures the swinging motion of the hoist in the lab-scale gantry crane system. Provides real-time angular displacement data for trajectory validation and control optimization."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed affecting crane dynamics. Environmental data is critical for accurate simulation and validation of crane behavior under varying conditions."
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance ArduinoMeasurementSystem : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Arduino-based system interfacing with all physical sensors (SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer) to collect real-time data. Acts as the primary data acquisition layer between physical components and digital twin services."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneStateDataTransmitted
]

instance LoggingApplication : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Containerized application logging crane state data (position, velocity, swinging motion, environmental conditions) to TimescaleDB. Implements Python scripts for data collection and storage."
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance CraneStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ArduinoMeasurementSystem
]

instance SensorDataToMQTT : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ArduinoMeasurementSystem
    base:desc "Asynchronous messaging of sensor data to MQTT Broker for real-time processing by digital twin services."
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance CraneCADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D representation of the gantry crane created in Autodesk Fusion 360. Includes detailed geometry of gantry frame, motors, and electromagnet for visualization and simulation purposes."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Fusion360Enabler
]

instance CraneKinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Mathematical model describing crane kinematics used by Trajectory Generator Service. Computes optimal trajectories without residual swinging by modeling motor positions and swinging dynamics."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantryLibEnabler
]

instance CraneSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Physics-based simulation model replicating crane dynamics for validation. Implemented in Simulation Service to test control strategies offline."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantryLibEnabler
]

instance TimeSeriesCraneData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Historical time-series data including motor positions, swinging angles, and environmental conditions (wind speed) stored in TimescaleDB. Used for analysis, validation, and performance monitoring."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneStateDataTransmitted, WindSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance ArcadiaSystemModels : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE) models created in Capella for system architecture representation and evolution. Supports documentation of DT development and validation processes."
]

// C11: Enablers
instance TimescaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "PostgreSQL-based time-series database storing crane operational data. Optimized for high-write workloads and time-based queries essential for digital twin validation."
    DTDFVocab:enables LoggingService
]

instance MQTTBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker facilitating asynchronous messaging between physical crane interface, logging application, and digital twin services. Enables loosely coupled architecture."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance GantryLibEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python-based library containing core digital twin services (Trajectory Generation, Simulation). Implements kinematic models and control algorithms for crane operation."
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGenerationService, SimulationService
]

instance GrafanaEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data visualization platform displaying real-time and historical crane data. Includes trajectory traces with simulated confidence bounds for operator monitoring."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance Fusion360Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Autodesk Fusion 360 CAD software used for creating and maintaining 3D models of the gantry crane system. Supports both design and simulation workflows."
]

instance CapellaEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MBSE tool implementing Arcadia models for system architecture documentation. Captures DT evolution patterns and validation requirements."
]

instance DockerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization platform deploying digital twin services (Database, MQTT Broker, Dashboard) with automated setup via Docker Compose. Ensures reproducible deployment across environments."
]

// C6: Services
instance LoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuously logs crane state data (motor positions, swinging angles, environmental conditions) to TimescaleDB. Implements Python scripts for data collection and storage."
    DTDFVocab:provides CraneDataInsight
]

instance TrajectoryGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Computes optimal swing-free trajectories using kinematic model of the crane. Ensures precise and energy-efficient movement by minimizing residual swinging."
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryAction, TrajectoryOptimizationInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Replicates crane behavior for offline testing and validation of control strategies. Uses physics-based simulation model to predict system response under various conditions."
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationValidationInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Compares executed trajectories (from physical twin) with simulated trajectories using distance metrics. Threshold breaches trigger alerts via dashboard for fault detection."
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionAction, ValidationResultInsight
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visualizes real-time and historical crane data including trajectory traces with simulated confidence bounds. Provides operators with comprehensive monitoring capabilities."
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemHealthInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance CraneDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical time-series data of crane operations including motor positions, swinging angles, and environmental conditions. Enables performance analysis and validation of digital twin accuracy."
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatically generated swing-free trajectories sent to physical crane interface for execution. Reduces energy consumption and improves operational safety."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance TrajectoryOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of trajectory optimization results showing improvements in swinging reduction and energy efficiency compared to baseline control strategies."
]

instance SimulationValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation results comparing simulated crane behavior with physical twin execution. Identifies discrepancies for model refinement and control strategy improvement."
]

instance FaultDetectionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic alert generation when executed trajectories deviate from simulated trajectories beyond predefined thresholds. Triggers operator intervention for corrective actions."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ValidationResultInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Quantitative validation metrics comparing physical twin performance with digital twin predictions. Includes distance metrics and confidence interval analysis."
]

instance SystemHealthInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of crane system health through visualization of operational parameters (motor positions, swinging angles, environmental conditions)."
]

// C2: Acting Components
instance CartStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor responsible for horizontal movement of the crane cart. Controlled via TMC4671-Eval motor controller for precise positioning."
]

instance HoistStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor responsible for vertical hoisting of the crane load. Integrated with electromagnet for container pickup operations."
]

instance CraneElectromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnetic actuator at hoist end for picking up and releasing pucks (containers). Controlled via Arduino-based system receiving commands from digital twin."
]

instance ArduinoControlSystem : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Arduino-based control system interfacing with stepper motors, electromagnet, and sensors. Executes commands from digital twin's Control Application container."
]

instance PowerSupplyUnit : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electrical power supply providing stable voltage to crane electronics including Arduino, motor controllers, and sensors. Critical for reliable operation of all acting components."
]

// C1: Physical Components (Containers)
instance PhysicalCraneContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical implementation of the lab-scale gantry crane including mechanical structure, stepper motors, electromagnet, and Arduino-based control system."
    base:isContainedIn LabScaleCraneEnvironment
]

instance PhysicalCraneInterfaceContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Python program interfacing between digital twin Control Application and physical crane acting components. Translates commands into motor/electromagnet control signals."
    base:isContainedIn ControlSystemEnvironment
]

instance ControlApplicationContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital twin service container generating control commands for physical crane operation. Implements trajectory generation and validation logic."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinServiceEnvironment
]

instance DigitalTwinDatabaseContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Containerized TimescaleDB instance storing all time-series data from crane operations. Provides high-performance storage for digital twin services."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinServiceEnvironment
]

instance DigitalTwinDashboardContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Grafana-based container providing real-time visualization of crane data and validation results. Accessible for operators and researchers."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinServiceEnvironment
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorServiceContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Service container implementing optimal trajectory generation using kinematic models. Part of the GantryLib Python module."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinServiceEnvironment
]

instance SimulationServiceContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Service container replicating crane dynamics for offline validation. Uses physics-based models to test control strategies."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinServiceEnvironment
]

instance ContinuousValidationServiceContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Service container comparing executed trajectories with simulations. Implements distance metrics and alert generation for fault detection."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinServiceEnvironment
]

instance MQTTBrokerContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker container facilitating asynchronous messaging between all digital twin services and physical components."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinServiceEnvironment
]

// C12: Environments
instance LabScaleCraneEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PhysicalCraneContainer, ArduinoMeasurementSystem, Anemometer, SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance DigitalTwinServiceEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains DigitalTwinDatabaseContainer, DigitalTwinDashboardContainer,
                 TrajectoryGeneratorServiceContainer, SimulationServiceContainer,
                 ContinuousValidationServiceContainer, MQTTBrokerContainer
]

instance ControlSystemEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains ArduinoControlSystem, CartStepperMotor, HoistStepperMotor,
                 CraneElectromagnet, PowerSupplyUnit, PhysicalCraneInterfaceContainer
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The virtual-to-physical interaction is mediated through the following pathways:
    - **Control Application**: Receives optimized trajectory commands from the **Trajectory Generator Service** and sends them via the **Physical Crane Interface** to the **Arduino**, which actuates the motors and electromagnet.
    - **MQTT Broker**: Transmits control signals and configuration updates from the DT services (e.g., **Trajectory Generator**, **Simulation Service**) to the **Control Application**.
    - **Human Machine Interface (HMI)**: Allows operators to manually override or configure the crane's behavior, with commands relayed through the **Control Application** to the PT."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates at **real-time synchronization rates** for critical services:
    - **Data Logging**: Continuous, high-frequency logging of crane state (e.g., motor positions, swinging angles) with millisecond-level precision.
    - **Control Loop**: The **Control Application** and **Trajectory Generator Service** operate at sub-second intervals to ensure smooth and accurate crane movement.
    - **Validation**: The **Continuous Validation Service** performs near-real-time comparisons (e.g., trajectory validation) with minimal latency to detect deviations promptly.
    The system is designed for **low-latency interactions** between the PT and DT to maintain synchronization."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is organized as follows:
    - **Physical Layer**: Consists of the **Physical Crane** (hardware) and **Physical Crane Interface** (Python-based communication layer).
    - **Digital Layer**: Comprises **Database (TimescaleDB)**, **MQTT Broker**, **Trajectory Generator Service**, **Simulation Service**, **Continuous Validation Service**, and **Dashboard (Grafana)**.
    - **User Interaction Layer**: **Human Machine Interface (HMI)** for operators and researchers.
    The constellation follows a **C4 Model architecture**, with clear separation between physical and digital components. Data flows bidirectionally between the PT and DT via the **MQTT Broker** and **Logging Application**."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT covers the following lifecycle stages of the PT:
    - **As Designed**: Represented by **CAD models (Autodesk Fusion 360)** and **kinematic models** used in the **Trajectory Generator Service** and **Simulation Service**.
    - **As Manufactured**: Validated through **continuous validation** during operation, comparing simulated (ideal) and executed (real) trajectories.
    - **As Operated**: Real-time monitoring and fault detection via the **Continuous Validation Service** and **Logging Application**, with data stored for post-operation analysis.
    The DT does not explicitly model **maintenance or degradation** but focuses on operational validation and optimization."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
    - **Model Validation**: The **Continuous Validation Service** compares executed trajectories with simulated trajectories using distance metrics, with configurable thresholds for alerts.
    - **Uncertainty Handling**: The **Simulation Service** provides confidence bounds for trajectories, accounting for environmental factors (e.g., wind speed).
    - **Verification**: The **Trajectory Generator Service** uses a kinematic model validated against real-world data to ensure swing-free movement.
    - **Error Detection**: Time-series classification techniques (e.g., in [6]) are used to localize faults in the PT by analyzing deviations in logged data."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection between PT and DT includes:
    - **Network Protocol**: **MQTT** (via **Eclipse Mosquitto**) for lightweight, asynchronous messaging between services.
    - **Data Transmission**: The **Physical Crane Interface** (Python) collects sensor data from the **Arduino** and publishes it to the **MQTT Broker**, which distributes it to subscribers (e.g., **Logging Application**, **Continuous Validation Service**).
    - **Control Signals**: Commands from the **Control Application** are sent via MQTT to the **Arduino**, which actuates the motors and electromagnet.
    - **Database Access**: The **Logging Application** writes data to **TimescaleDB** using SQL queries."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is hosted and deployed as follows:
    - **Local Deployment**: All software runs on a **personal computer** connected to the PT, with the exception of containerized services.
    - **Containerization**: **Database (TimescaleDB)**, **MQTT Broker**, and **Dashboard (Grafana)** are deployed using **Docker** and managed via a **docker-compose.yml** file for automated setup.
    - **Python Module**: The **gantrylib** module is installed via **pip**, enabling easy integration of additional DT services.
    - **Hardware Integration**: The **Arduino** and **motor controllers** are directly connected to the PT, with data transmitted to the PC via USB or serial communication."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to the following standards and practices:
    - **Open-Source Licensing**: Published under the **MIT License**, allowing for free use and modification.
    - **Interoperability**: Uses **MQTT** (IETF standard) for messaging and **TimescaleDB** (PostgreSQL-compatible) for data storage.
    - **Modeling Standards**: **Autodesk Fusion 360** for CAD and **Capella** (MBSE) for system architecture.
    - **Containerization**: **Docker** and **Docker Compose** for deployment, following industry-standard practices for microservices."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety considerations include:
    - **Local Deployment**: The DT runs on a **personal computer** connected to the PT, reducing exposure to remote attacks.
    - **Control Safety**: The **Control Application** includes safeguards (e.g., homing and zeroing procedures) to prevent unsafe operations.
    - **Fault Detection**: The **Continuous Validation Service** and **time-series classification techniques** detect anomalies and alert operators to potential issues.
    - **No Remote Execution**: The DT does not execute operations remotely on the PT; all commands are validated locally before transmission to the **Arduino** and motor controllers.
    - **Environmental Monitoring**: The **Anemometer** measures wind speed, which is used in simulations to account for external forces affecting crane stability."
]
